title: service
text: service A component that contains one or more operations that can be called by a Uniface application. Related Links operation A script module that can be activated from other script modules, either from within the current component or from another component. It is analogous to a method in other programming languages, and is declared with operation ProcScript statement. Services Service components are designed to handle most Uniface application processing. They usually group together those entities that are needed to support the processing of a business object, such as an order or a customer. For example, an order update service could combine entities used to update both customer and order entities. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
